# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Project-wide instructions for GitHub Copilot. These rules apply to code completions, chat, and agent-mode interactions.

## General

- Follow existing code conventions and patterns in this repository
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones
- Keep changes scoped to the current task
- Do not add dependencies without explicit approval
- Ask for clarification when requirements are ambiguous

## Testing

Follow the project's existing testing conventions.

## Commits

- Use clear, descriptive commit messages
- One logical change per commit
- Consider adding `Assisted-by: GitHub Copilot` trailer when Copilot was used

## Review

Follow the project's standard review process.
